title: task
description: aprs_is.rs:228 and aprs_is.rs:346 - The callsign parameter is interpolated directly into APRS-IS protocol messages without sanitization. If callsign contains CR/LF characters, an attacker can inject arbitrary APRS-IS commands or forge packets from other callsigns. Failure scenario: User passes callsign 'W1ABC\r\nW2FAKE>APRS:!0000.00N/00000.00W-' which injects a spoofed position packet. Fix: Validate callsign contains only uppercase A-Z, digits 0-9, and hyphen; reject or escape CR/LF/special characters.
